# Coding Conventions

> Provide a tree diagram file to give a general description of the project structure.
> Check lint files such as Prettier, ESLint, Flutter Lint Config, etc., to establish rules for semicolons, single/double quotes, tab size, spaces, line breaks, and so on.
> Focus on naming conventions for variables, functions, and files. For special variables, functions, or files, add specific notes (e.g., React hooks use 'use', NestJS services use name.service.ts, etc.).
> Logical arrangement, which part to write first and which part to write last.
> Add other rules such as validation, logging, error handling, database, cache, testing, integration with backend/frontend, and integration with third-party libraries.
